name: codex-toys
description: Codex workflow authoring, runtime operation, SSH workspace orchestration, and dashboard guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Author workflows and operate Codex runtimes.
interface.longDescription: codex-toys provides Codex guidance for workflow scripts, local and SSH runtimes, functions, and optional local dashboard HTTP edges. This plugin installs the Codex-facing guidance directly from the Git repository.
defaultPrompt: Author a workflow script that can skip or start a Codex turn.
Discover my Codex App remote connections and run codex-toys over SSH.
Run codex-toys against a remote Codex workspace over SSH.
Build a local dashboard for a remote workspace over SSH.
